channel.title: China Semi-Tech Daily
channel.description: Daily intelligence on A-share semiconductor IPO & refinancing pipeline. Data-driven insights for investors, analysts, and strategists.

item.title: China Semi-Tech Daily — 2026-06-01
item.description: 2026-06-01 Semiconductor IPO & Refinancing Pipeline Update. 1,584 companies tracked.
